ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laptops" (
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the laptop */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the laptop model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the laptop (e.g., Ultrabook, Notebook) */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the laptop */,
  "screen_description" TEXT /* Description of the screen type and resolution */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications of the laptop */,
  "ram" TEXT /* Amount of RAM in the laptop */,
  "storage" TEXT /* Storage capacity of the laptop */,
  "gpu" TEXT /* GPU specifications of the laptop */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system installed on the laptop */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the laptop in kg */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the laptop */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options for the laptop */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Battery life of the laptop */,
  "ports" TEXT /* Types and number of ports available on the laptop */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information for the laptop */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the laptop model */,
  "os_license_key" TEXT /* Operating system license key for the laptop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category for the laptop category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop model */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the laptop available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity before reorder is necessary */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the inventory */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the laptops sold */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale */,
  "sales_rep" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for generating the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is saved */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "min_purchase_required" REAL /* Minimum purchase required to qualify for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments on the laptop */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the manufacturer or support team to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'New', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the laptop ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the laptop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the return belongs to */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop that was returned */,
  "reason_for_return" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_returns_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)
